docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DINA KANAYA--PARALEGAL. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, TIMOTHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STUBHUB, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
